Patch of fruit up the hillside from the GAP trail. There is an exit onto a side trail to access the pawpaw trees. It appears more fruit was on the larger trees higher up the hill in the sunny locations. Access: Public.
730 Great Allegheny Passage, Stewart Township, PA 15431, USA

Pawpaw patch next to the GAP. There was some fruit on the tallest trees. There seems to be an adjacent trail (marked yellow) that runs along the GAP but you can venture off the GAP. Not too bad. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
